strengths: ~19 years of hands-on software engineering across web, embedded, and high-throughput systems (e.g., microservices handling millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby), exceeding the 15-year minimum
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform deployed on Kubernetes and used by Green Map
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, plus builder fluency across TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and cloud tooling (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
concerns: No evidence of director/principal-level scope: career history is senior/staff IC delivery work with no organization-wide technical strategy, product direction, or executive advisory experience
AI depth is thin and very recent (since April 2025); no demonstrated AI products or platforms, no recognized AI expertise, and no Master's/PhD in an AI-related field
No experience advising strategic customers/partners or driving cloud/AI platform strategy; public speaking is limited to testing and GIS workshops, not AI thought leadership

key_factors.factor: Recognized AI expertise and AI-built products
15+ years engineering experience with startup/founder background

response.justification: The role's core competencies are AI strategy leadership, recognized AI expertise with shipped AI products, cloud platform vision, and executive-level influence. The candidate clearly meets the minimum bar: a BS in Computer Science and roughly 19 years of engineering experience, including strong distributed-systems work at Dunnhumby and founder experience with GISCollective, which satisfies the entrepreneurial preference. However, the AI competency rests on a single recent line about MCP code generators and agentic tooling at re:cinq — there is no demonstrated AI product, platform, publication, or recognized expertise. Evidence of strategic or advisory scope (identifying future product states, advising strategic customers, inspiring at scale) is absent; all roles are execution-focused senior IC positions. Strong builder credentials cannot offset the missing AI strategy and director-level leadership evidence for this specific role.
